data.module_description: This is an adapter domain that encapsulates all external service integrations including Alibaba Cloud OSS (Object Storage Service), SMS providers, and email services. The module provides a unified interface for other domains to access third-party capabilities through Dubbo RPC services. The architecture follows a clean separation between API contracts (third-party-api module) and implementations (third-party-provider module), enabling loose coupling and easy provider substitution. Key services include: 1) OSS Service for file upload/download with support for both simple and multipart uploads with retry mechanisms; 2) SMS Provider Service for sending verification codes via Alibaba Cloud Market SMS API; 3) Email Provider Service supporting plain text, HTML, and attachment-based email delivery via SMTP. The module operates without a database (explicitly excludes DataSource configurations) as a stateless integration layer.
data.interaction:
**API Interfaces (Dubbo RPC):**

1. **OSSAPI Interface:**
   - `uploadFile(OSSUploadFileRequest)` → `OSSUploadFileResponse`: Single file upload with UUID-based naming
   - `multiUpload(OSSMultiUploadFileRequest)` → `OSSMultiUploadFileResponse`: Chunked large file upload with configurable partSize and maxRetry

2. **SMSAPI Interface:**
   - `sendSMS(SendSMSRequest)` → `SendSMSResponse`: Send verification code SMS with phone, code, and optional templateId

3. **EmailAPI Interface:**
   - `sendMail(SendEmailRequest)` → `SendEmailResponse`: Plain text email
   - `sendHTMLMail(SendEmailRequest)` → `SendEmailResponse`: HTML formatted email
   - `sendAttachmentEmail(SendAttachEmailRequest)` → `SendEmailResponse`: Email with file attachments

**Request/Response DTOs:**
- All responses extend `BaseResponse` providing standardized `code` (ToBCodeEnum) and `message` fields
- OSSUploadFileRequest/Response include MultipartFile and returned URL
- SendSMSRequest includes phone, code, templateId
- SendEmailRequest includes to, theme, content; SendAttachEmailRequest extends with fileName, filePath

**Cross-Cutting Concerns:**
- TraceIdFilter middleware extracts X-Trace-Id header and stores in MDC for distributed tracing
- Services exposed via @DubboService annotation for RPC consumption
data.implementation:
**1. OSS Service Implementation (OSSServiceImpl + AliOSSUtils):**
- Uses Alibaba Cloud OSS SDK with V4 signature algorithm
- Simple Upload: Creates OSSClient, executes putObject with 3-retry mechanism, generates 1-hour presigned URL
- Multipart Upload: Initializes upload, reads InputStream in chunks, uploads parts with retry, completes or aborts on failure
- File naming: UUID + original extension to prevent conflicts
- Configuration via @Value injection (endpoint, accessKeyId, accessKeySecret, bucketName)
- Known Issues: Static field @Value injection doesn't work in Spring; duplicate partETags.add() call; inconsistent exception handling

**2. SMS Service Implementation (SMSServiceImpl):**
- Integrates with Alibaba Cloud Market SMS API via HTTP POST
- Authentication via APPCODE in Authorization header
- Request body: code (verification code), templateId (SMS template), mobile (phone number)
- Uses HttpUtils utility for HTTP communication
- Configuration: host, path, appCode, tpl_id via @Value

**3. Email Service Implementation (EmailServiceImpl):**
- Uses Jakarta Mail API with SMTP protocol
- SMTP Configuration: host, port 587, STARTTLS enabled
- Authentication via from (sender email) and password
- Plain/HTML email: MimeMessage with appropriate Content-Type
- Attachment email: MimeMultipart with MimeBodyPart for content and FileDataSource for attachments
- Session management via getSession() method with Authenticator

**4. Distributed Tracing (TraceIdFilter):**
- Extends OncePerRequestFilter for single execution per request
- Extracts X-Trace-Id from HTTP header, stores in SLF4J MDC
- Ensures cleanup in finally block to prevent memory leaks
- Logback pattern includes traceId/spanId for log correlation

**5. Application Bootstrap:**
- Excludes DataSourceAutoConfiguration, DataSourceTransactionManagerAutoConfiguration, HibernateJpaAutoConfiguration
- Stateless service design for pure integration/proxy functionality
data.flowchart_mermaid:
flowchart TB
    subgraph External["External Services"]
        AliOSS["Alibaba Cloud OSS"]
        AliSMS["Alibaba Cloud SMS API"]
        SMTP["SMTP Email Server"]
    end
    
    subgraph ThirdPartyProvider["Third-Party Provider Module"]
        subgraph Services["Dubbo RPC Services"]
            OSSService["OSSServiceImpl\n@DubboService"]
            SMSService["SMSServiceImpl\n@DubboService"]
            EmailService["EmailServiceImpl\n@DubboService"]
        end
        
        subgraph Utils["Utility Layer"]
            AliOSSUtils["AliOSSUtils\n- uploadFile()\n- multipartUploadByStream()\n- generatePresignedUrl()"]
            HttpUtils["HttpUtils\n- doPost()"]
        end
        
        subgraph Config["Configuration"]
            TraceFilter["TraceIdFilter\n(MDC Tracing)"]
            AppConfig["Application Config\n(No DataSource)"]
        end
    end
    
    subgraph ThirdPartyAPI["Third-Party API Module (Contracts)"]
        subgraph Interfaces["API Interfaces"]
            OSSAPI["OSSAPI"]
            SMSAPI["SMSAPI"]
            EmailAPI["EmailAPI"]
        end
        
        subgraph DTOs["Data Transfer Objects"]
            OSSReq["OSSUploadFileRequest\nOSSMultiUploadFileRequest"]
            OSSRes["OSSUploadFileResponse\nOSSMultiUploadFileResponse"]
            SMSReq["SendSMSRequest"]
            SMSRes["SendSMSResponse"]
            EmailReq["SendEmailRequest\nSendAttachEmailRequest"]
            EmailRes["SendEmailResponse"]
        end
    end
    
    subgraph Consumers["Service Consumers"]
        OtherServices["Other Domain Services\n(via Dubbo RPC)"]
    end
    
    OtherServices -->|"Dubbo RPC Call"| OSSAPI
    OtherServices -->|"Dubbo RPC Call"| SMSAPI
    OtherServices -->|"Dubbo RPC Call"| EmailAPI
    
    OSSAPI --> OSSService
    SMSAPI --> SMSService
    EmailAPI --> EmailService
    
    OSSService --> AliOSSUtils
    SMSService --> HttpUtils
    
    AliOSSUtils -->|"OSS SDK\nV4 Signature"| AliOSS
    HttpUtils -->|"HTTP POST"| AliSMS
    EmailService -->|"Jakarta Mail\nSMTP"| SMTP
    
    OSSReq -.->|"input"| OSSService
    OSSService -.->|"output"| OSSRes
    SMSReq -.->|"input"| SMSService
    SMSService -.->|"output"| SMSRes
    EmailReq -.->|"input"| EmailService
    EmailService -.->|"output"| EmailRes
    
    TraceFilter -.->|"X-Trace-Id\nMDC"| Services
data.sequence_diagram_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Consumer as Service Consumer
    participant DubboRPC as Dubbo RPC Layer
    participant TraceFilter as TraceIdFilter
    participant OSSService as OSSServiceImpl
    participant SMSService as SMSServiceImpl
    participant EmailService as EmailServiceImpl
    participant AliOSSUtils as AliOSSUtils
    participant HttpUtils as HttpUtils
    participant AliOSS as Alibaba Cloud OSS
    participant AliSMS as Alibaba SMS API
    participant SMTP as SMTP Server

    rect rgb(200, 220, 255)
        Note over Consumer, AliOSS: OSS File Upload Flow
        Consumer->>DubboRPC: uploadFile(OSSUploadFileRequest)
        DubboRPC->>OSSService: invoke uploadFile()
        OSSService->>OSSService: Validate filename
        OSSService->>OSSService: Generate UUID filename
        OSSService->>AliOSSUtils: uploadFile(filename, inputStream)
        AliOSSUtils->>AliOSSUtils: Create OSSClient (V4 Signature)
        AliOSSUtils->>AliOSS: putObjectWithRetry (max 3 attempts)
        AliOSS-->>AliOSSUtils: Upload Success
        AliOSSUtils->>AliOSSUtils: generatePresignedUrl (1hr expiry)
        AliOSSUtils-->>OSSService: Return presigned URL
        OSSService-->>Consumer: OSSUploadFileResponse(url, SUCCESS)
    end

    rect rgb(220, 255, 220)
        Note over Consumer, AliOSS: OSS Multipart Upload Flow
        Consumer->>DubboRPC: multiUpload(OSSMultiUploadFileRequest)
        DubboRPC->>OSSService: invoke multiUpload()
        OSSService->>AliOSSUtils: multipartUploadByStream(filename, stream, partSize, maxRetry)
        AliOSSUtils->>AliOSS: initiateMultipartUpload()
        AliOSS-->>AliOSSUtils: Return uploadId
        loop For each chunk
            AliOSSUtils->>AliOSSUtils: Read partSize bytes from stream
            AliOSSUtils->>AliOSS: uploadPartWithRetry()
            AliOSS-->>AliOSSUtils: PartETag
        end
        AliOSSUtils->>AliOSS: completeMultipartUpload(partETags)
        AliOSS-->>AliOSSUtils: Complete Success
        AliOSSUtils-->>OSSService: Return presigned URL
        OSSService-->>Consumer: OSSMultiUploadFileResponse(url, SUCCESS)
    end

    rect rgb(255, 220, 220)
        Note over Consumer, AliSMS: SMS Sending Flow
        Consumer->>DubboRPC: sendSMS(SendSMSRequest)
        DubboRPC->>SMSService: invoke sendSMS()
        SMSService->>SMSService: Build headers (APPCODE auth)
        SMSService->>SMSService: Build body (code, templateId, mobile)
        SMSService->>HttpUtils: doPost(host, path, headers, body)
        HttpUtils->>AliSMS: HTTP POST Request
        AliSMS-->>HttpUtils: HTTP Response
        HttpUtils-->>SMSService: Response
        SMSService-->>Consumer: SendSMSResponse(SUCCESS)
    end

    rect rgb(255, 255, 200)
        Note over Consumer, SMTP: Email Sending Flow
        Consumer->>DubboRPC: sendMail(SendEmailRequest)
        DubboRPC->>EmailService: invoke sendMail()
        EmailService->>EmailService: getSession() - SMTP config, auth
        EmailService->>EmailService: Create MimeMessage
        EmailService->>EmailService: Set from, to, subject, content
        EmailService->>SMTP: Transport.send(message)
        SMTP-->>EmailService: Send Success
        EmailService-->>Consumer: SendEmailResponse(SUCCESS)
    end

    rect rgb(230, 230, 255)
        Note over Consumer, SMTP: Attachment Email Flow
        Consumer->>DubboRPC: sendAttachmentEmail(SendAttachEmailRequest)
        DubboRPC->>EmailService: invoke sendAttachmentEmail()
        EmailService->>EmailService: getSession()
        EmailService->>EmailService: Create MimeMultipart
        EmailService->>EmailService: Add text body part
        EmailService->>EmailService: Add FileDataSource attachment
        EmailService->>SMTP: Transport.send(multipart message)
        SMTP-->>EmailService: Send Success
        EmailService-->>Consumer: SendEmailResponse(SUCCESS)
    end
